info.name: Driver Network — UC1-B Gig Delivery Driver (Abbreviated)
info.description:
## Driver Network — UC1-B: Gig Delivery Driver Application (Abbreviated)

**Scenario:** A delivery driver applies for a GIG two-wheeler delivery role on QuickDeliver Platform. No interview required — background check passes, offer issued directly, driver accepts, onboarded same day.

**Protocol:** Beckn v2.0.0 + DriverJobResource v2.1
**BAP:** Driver Platform  |  **BPP:** Gig Delivery Operator
**Category:** driver-job  |  **Role:** DELIVERY_DRIVER  |  **Employment:** GIG

### Abbreviated hiring stage progression
APPLICATION_SUBMITTED → OFFER_ISSUED (background check only) → HIRING_CONFIRMED → ONBOARDING_COMPLETE

### Key difference from UC1-A
No INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED or EVALUATION_COMPLETE stages. GIG roles skip the evaluation cycle — background check is sufficient.

variable.description: Confirm exact value with network registry team
UUID format required by core spec
PII — Driver Passport reference. Disclosed at init and later only.

item.name: 07 — update  ★ OFFER_ISSUED (background check only)
item.description: No interview for GIG role — offer issued after background check.
